task_completion.description: Open and read the routing specification file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Desktop/routing_spec.md'.

task_completion.description: Log into the Rancher dashboard at https://localhost.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rancher login screen with credentials entered, or the main Rancher dashboard visible after a successful login.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'web-apps' namespace in the Rancher UI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rancher UI showing 'web-apps' selected in the project/namespace dropdown or context menu.

task_completion.description: Create Kubernetes Services for the three web application deployments (frontend, api, docs).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rancher Services/Service Discovery page showing new services being created or already listed for 'frontend', 'api', and 'docs'.

task_completion.description: Initiate the creation of an Ingress resource in the 'web-apps' namespace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rancher Ingress creation form open, or an Ingress resource visible in the 'web-apps' namespace list.

task_completion.description: Configure path-based routing rules in the Ingress resource.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Ingress configuration screen showing multiple routing paths (e.g., rules for frontend, api, and docs) mapped to their respective target services.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Rancher web interface or valid Kubernetes CLI tools to create resources.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser window showing the Rancher UI with active interactions (dropdowns, form inputs, active tabs) or valid kubectl commands executed in the terminal.

integrity.description: The agent applied the configurations to the cluster rather than just writing YAML files without applying them.
integrity.visual_evidence: Success notifications in Rancher, resources appearing in the Rancher lists as 'Active', or successful 'kubectl apply' outputs in the terminal.

integrity.description: The agent actually opened the spec file rather than guessing the paths or hallucinating the requirements.
integrity.visual_evidence: A clear screenshot of the routing_spec.md file being read in a text editor or terminal before the Ingress rules are configured.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target namespace is 'web-apps'. The routing specification is located at '/home/ga/Desktop/routing_spec.md'. The three deployments to be exposed are 'frontend', 'api', and 'docs'. The passing score threshold is 70.
